name: Peryton
primary_sources: Book of Imaginary Beings by Jorge Luis Borges

distinctive_features: Head, neck, forelegs, and antlers of a stag
Plumage, wings, and hindquarters of a large bird
Casts the shadow of a human until it kills one
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Size of a large bird with stag features
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Stag features at the front, bird features at the back

domain_specific_functional.SYMBOLIC_SHADOW: Casts human shadow until it kills

relationships.target: Heraldry of King Charles VI of France
relationships.description: Winged stags used as heraldic supports
Prophesied to lead to the downfall of Rome

primary_sources: Book of Imaginary Beings by Jorge Luis Borges

contrastive_constraints: NOT purely stag or purely bird
